template.name: Permanent that can be cast using {C}
template.scryfallQuery: mv<=1 (mana={0} or mana={1} or mana={C}) is:permanent

almostIncluded.description:
Activate Sol Ring by tapping it, adding {C} {C}.
Cast the permanent that can be cast using {C} by paying its mana cost.
Hullbreaker Horror triggers, returning Sol Ring from the battlefield to your hand.
Cast Sol Ring by paying {1}. 
Hullbreaker Horror triggers, returning the permanent cast in step 2 from the battlefield to your hand.
Repeat.
If the permanent can be cast by paying {0}, this combo nets infinite colorless mana.

Cast Sol Ring by paying its mana cost.
Tidespout Tyrant triggers, returning a nontoken permanent that can be cast using {C} from the battlefield to your hand.
Activate Sol Ring by tapping it, adding {C}{C}.
Cast the nontoken permanent returned in step 2 by paying its mana cost.
Tidespout Tyrant triggers, returning Sol Ring from the battlefield to your hand.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: You control a nontoken permanent that can be cast using {C}.

almostIncluded.notes: This combo will also deal damage to you equal to 13 times the number of creatures you control. It is recommended that your life total is above this number to ensure you don't lose the game from the damage if your opponents will not take lethal damage from this combo.
almostIncluded.description:
Cast Blasphemous Act by paying at most {8}{R}, dealing 13 damage to each creature.
Repercussion triggers for each creature dealt damage this way.
Resolve the first Repercussion trigger, dealing 13 damage to an opponent.
Repeat step 3 for each Repercussion trigger, ensuring to resolve all triggers that would damage your opponent(s) first.

feature.name: Infinite mana creatures you control can produce
Infinite untap of creatures you control

almostIncluded.description:
At the beginning of your combat phase, Helm of the Host triggers, creating a nonlegendary token copy of Aurelia.
Declare the token Aurelia as an attacker.
The token Aurelia triggers, causing you to untap all creatures you control and get an additional combat phase after this one.
Repeat each combat phase.

Cast Approach of the Second Sun by paying {6}{W}, causing you to gain seven life and put Approach of the Second Sun into your library seventh from the top.
Cast Windfall by paying {2}{U}, causing each player to discard their hand and draw at least seven cards.
Cast Approach of the Second Sun by paying {6}{W}, causing you to win the game.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: You have at least nine cards in hand, or an opponent has at least seven cards in hand.

card.name: Toralf, God of Fury // Toralf's Hammer
card.typeLine: Legendary Creature — God // Legendary Artifact — Equipment

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Blasphemous Act by paying at most {7}{R}, dealing 13 damage to each creature.
Each creature an opponent controls who was dealt dealt excess damage this way causes Toralf to trigger.
Resolve the first Toralf trigger, dealing an amount of damage to an opponent.
Repeat step 3 for each remaining trigger.

Give Boros Reckoner lifelink.
Cast Boros Charm by paying {R}{W}, giving permanents you control indestructible until end of turn.
Deal damage to Boros Reckoner.
Boros Reckoner triggers, dealing that much damage to itself and causing you to gain that much life.
Repeat step 4 any number of times.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You have a way to give Boros Reckoner lifelink.
You have a way to deal damage to Boros Reckoner.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Blasphemous Act by paying at most {7}{R}, dealing 13 damage to each creature.
For each creature opponents control that is dealt excess damage, Fall of Cair Andros triggers, creating a 0/0 Army if you dont control one, and putting a number of +1/+1 counters on an Army you control equal to the excess damage.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: An opponent controls a creature with toughness less than 13.

feature.name: Put all basic lands from your library onto the battlefield

almostIncluded.description:
Declare Aurelia and the creature with Sword of Hearth and Home attached as attackers, attacking an opponent unable to block them.
Aurelia triggers, causing you to untap all creatures you control and to get an additional combat phase after this one.
Deal combat damage with Aurelia and the creature that has Sword of Hearth and Home attached.
Sword of Hearth and Home triggers, blinking Aurelia and searching your library for a basic land card and putting it onto the battlefield.
Repeat each combat phase.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
Sword of Hearth and Home attached to any other creature you control.
The creature with Sword of Hearth and Home attached can attack this turn.
An opponent cannot block and kill the creature with Sword of Hearth and Home attached and Aurelia.

feature.name: Infinite draw triggers for all players
Infinite self-discard triggers for all players

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Windfall from your graveyard for its escape cost by paying {2}{U} and exiling three cards from your graveyard, causing each player to discard at least three cards and draw at least three cards.
Smothering Tithe triggers for each card drawn by your opponents, creating that many Treasure tokens.
Activate three of the Treasure tokens by tapping and sacrificing them, adding {2}{U}.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
A player has at least three cards in hand.
There are at least three additional cards in your graveyard.
At least one opponent is unable to pay for Smothering Tithe's trigger.

almostIncluded.description:
Each time an opponent draws a card, Smothering Tithe triggers.
Opponents will eventually be unable to pay for Smothering Tithe due to Statis causing them to skip their untap steps, causing you to create a Treasure artifact token.
At the beginning of your upkeep, Stasis triggers.
Holding priority, activate a Treasure token by tapping and sacrificing it, adding {U}.
Resolve the Stasis ability, paying {U}.
Repeat.

feature.name: Exile all spells players cast from their hand
Players can only cast one spell per turn

almostIncluded.description:
Whenever a player casts a spell from their hand, Knowledge Pool triggers, exiling that spell.
Because Archon of Emeria prevents players from casting more than one spell each turn, players cannot cast the spell permitted by Knowledge Pool, or any other spell that turn.

feature.name: Each player may exile a portion of their library with the ability to play the exiled cards until the end of their next turn
Exile your library with the ability to play the exiled cards until the end of your next turn

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Blasphemous Act by paying at most {7}{R}, dealing 13 damage to each creature.
Expedited Inheritance triggers for each creature dealt damage.
Resolve the first trigger, allowing the creature's controller to exile 13 cards from the top of their library with the ability until the end of their next turn
Repeat step 3 as needed for any remaining triggers.
almostIncluded.easyPrerequisites: There's a creature on the battlefield.

almostIncluded.description: Cast Blasphemous Act by paying at most {7}{R}, dealing 13 damage to each creature and causing you to gain life equal to the damage dealt this way due to Soulfire Grand Master.

feature.name: Infinite mana creatures you control can produce
Infinite untap of creatures you control

almostIncluded.description:
Declare Brago and Aurelia as attackers, attacking an opponent unable to block and kill them.
Aurelia triggers, untapping all creatures you control and causing you to get an additional combat phase after this phase.
Deal combat damage with Brago and Aurelia.
Brago triggers, blinking Aurelia.
Repeat each combat phase.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
All permanents do not have summoning sickness.
An opponent is unable to block and kill Brago and Aurelia.

feature.name: Counter all spells players cast from their hands

almostIncluded.description:
Whenever a player casts a spell from their hand, Knowledge Pool triggers, exiling the spell and allowing the player to cast another card exiled by Knowledge Pool without paying its mana cost.
If the player chooses to cast a spell, Boromir triggers, countering that spell since no mana was spent to cast it.

feature.name: Infinite mana creatures you control can produce
Infinite untap of creatures you control

almostIncluded.description:
At the beginning of your combat phase, Rionya triggers, creating at least one token copy of Aurelia.
Put all but one Aurelia into your graveyard due to the legend rule, ensuring the remaining Aurelia has not attacked this turn.
Declare the remaining Aurelia as an attacker.
Aurelia triggers, untapping all creatures you control and causing you to get an additional combat phase after this one.
Repeat each combat phase.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: An opponent is unable to block and kill creatures you control.

uses.battlefieldCardState: attached to another creature you control that does not have summoning sickness and cannot be blocked by an opponent

almostIncluded.notes: If you choose a creature with mobilize 2 or higher, this combo makes extra Warrior tokens each loop.

feature.name: Infinite untap of creatures you control
Infinite mana creatures you control can produce

requires.battlefieldCardState: without summoning sickness and cannot be blcoked and killed by an opponent

almostIncluded.description:
Declare the creature with Breath of Fury attached and the creature with mobilize as attackers, triggering the creature with mobilize, creating at least one 1/1 Warrior creature token that is tapped and attacking.
Deal combat damage using the creature that has Breath of Fury attached. 
Breath of Fury triggers, causing you to sacrifice the creature it is attached to, then attach Breath of Fury to the Warrior token, then causing you to untap all creatures you control and to get an additional combat phase after this one. 
Repeat each combat phase.

feature.name: Infinite mana creatures you control can produce
Infinite untap of creatures you control

almostIncluded.description:
Declare Aurelia as an attacker, triggering it and Shaun's first ability.
Resolve the Shaun trigger, creating a tapped and attacking copy of Aurelia that is a nonlegendary Synth in addition to its other types.
Resolve the Aurelia trigger, untapping all creatures you control and causing you to get an additional combat phase after this one.
Repeat each combat phase.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: An opponent cannot block and kill creatures you control.

almostIncluded.notes: You can perform steps 3 and 4 before combat damage is dealt to ensure Aurelia does not die, or you can do so after damage is dealt but before the combat phase ends to deal combat damage.

feature.name: Infinite untap of creatures you control

almostIncluded.description:
Declare Aurelia as an attacker.
Aurelia triggers, untapping all creatures you control and causing you to take an extra combat phase after this one.
Activate any number of creatures you control by tapping them, adding at least {2}.
Activate Gilraen by paying {2} and tapping it, blinking Aurelia.
Repeat each combat phase.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
Creatues you control can tap to produce at least {2}.
Gilraen does not have summoning sickness.

feature.name: Near-infinite card draw for target opponent
Near-infinite draw triggers for target opponent

almostIncluded.description:
Activate Loran of the Third Path by tapping it, causing you and an opponent to draw a card.
Activate Mind Over Matter by discarding a card, untapping Loran of the Third Path.
Repeat.

feature.name: Infinite untap of creatures you control
Infinite mana creatures you control can produce

almostIncluded.description:
Declare Aurelia as an attacker, triggering its ability, causing you to untap all creatures you control and to get an additional combat phase after this one.
Deal combat damage to an opponent using Aurelia, triggering Impostor Syndrome, creating a token copy of Aurelia that isn't legendary.
During your next combat phase, declare Aurelia and the Aurelia token as attackers.
The Aurelia token triggers, causing you to untap all creatures you control and to get an additional combat phase after this one.
Repeat from step 2.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
An opponent cannot block and kill Aurelia.
An opponent cannot block creatures you control.

feature.name: Players can't cast spells from their hand

almostIncluded.description:
Any time a player would cast a spell from their hand it gets exiled from possibility storm.
Archon of Emeria prevents them from casting the other card from possiblity storm resulting in a lock.

feature.name: Counter all spells players cast from their hands

almostIncluded.description:
Whenever a player casts a spell from their hand, Possibility Storm triggers, exiling the spell and allowing the player to reveal cards from the top of their library until they reveal a spell that shares a type with the exiled spell, and cast it without paying its mana cost.
If the player chooses to cast the spell, Boromir triggers, countering that spell since no mana was spent to cast it.

feature.name: Infinite mana creatures you control can produce
Infinite untap of creatures you control
Infinitely powerful creature until end of turn

almostIncluded.description:
Declare Aurelia and The Neutrinos as attackers, triggering their abilities.
Resolve the Neutrinos trigger, blinking Aurelia and causing it to enter tapped and attacking.
Resolve the Aurelia trigger, causing you to untap all creatures you control and to get an additional combat phase after this one.
Repeat each combat phase.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: An opponent cannot block and kill creatures you control.

feature.name: Infinite mana among colors with which you have devotion
Infinite mana artifacts you control can produce
Infinite untap of artifacts you control

almostIncluded.description:
Activate Nyx Lotus by tapping it, adding at least {U}{U}{U}{U}.
Activate Filigree Sages by paying {2}{U}, untapping Nyx Lotus.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: Your devotion to blue is at least four.

almostIncluded.description:
Intruder Alarm's first ability prevents creatures from untapping during their controller's untap step.
Because Hushbringer prevents abilities from triggering whenever a creature enters the battlefield, Intruder Alarm's second ability does not trigger to untap them.

feature.name: Infinite untap of creatures you control
Infinite mana creatures you control can produce

almostIncluded.description:
Declare Aurelia and Sandstorm Crasher as attackers, choosing to exert Sandstorm Crasher as it attacks. Aurelia and Sandstorm Crasher each trigger.
Resolve the Sandstorm Crasher trigger, creating a token copy of Aurelia that is tapped and attacking.
Put the oldest Aurelia into your graveyard due to the legend rule.
Resolve the Aurelia trigger, untapping all creatures you control and causing you to get an additional combat phase after this one.
Repeat during each combat phase using the Aurelia token instead.
almostIncluded.easyPrerequisites: Sandstorm Crasher does not have summoning sickness.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: An opponent cannot block and kill creatures you control.

feature.name: Exile all instants and sorceries any player casts
Players can only cast one spell per turn

almostIncluded.description:
Whenever a player casts an instant or sorcery spell, Eye of the Storm triggers, exiling that spell.
Because Archon of Emeria prevents players from casting more than one spell each turn, players cannot cast the spell permitted by Eye of the Storm, or any other spell that turn.

feature.name: Infinite mana creatures you control can produce
Infinite untap of creatures you control

almostIncluded.description:
Declare Meneldor and Aurelia as attackers, attacking an opponent unable to block and kill them.
Aurelia triggers, untapping all creatures you control and causing you to get an additional combat phase after this phase.
Deal combat damage with Meneldor and Aurelia.
Meneldor triggers, blinking Aurelia.
Repeat each combat phase.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
All permanents do not have summoning sickness.
An opponent is unable to block and kill Meneldor and Aurelia.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Volcano Hellion by paying {2}{R}{R}.
Volcano Hellion enters the battlefield, dealing an arbitrarily large amount of damage to you and target creature, and causing you to gain life equal to the total amount of damage done this way.

feature.name: Infinite copies of one instant or sorcery

template.name: Instant or Sorcery that untaps a Creature
template.scryfallQuery: (t:instant or t:sorcery) o:"untap " (o:creature -o:"nonlegendary creature" or o:permanent -o:"noncreature permanent") -o:destroy

almostIncluded.description:
Cast the instant or sorcery by paying its mana cost.
Holding priority, activate Stella Lee by tapping it, copying the instant or sorcery.
Resolve the copy of the instant or sorcery, untapping Stella Lee.
Repeat from step 2.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You have cast at least two spells this turn.
Stella Lee does not have summoning sickness.
You have enough mana to cast the instant or sorcery card.
You have additional legal target(s) for the instant or sorcery card, if applicable.

card.name: Erayo, Soratami Ascendant // Erayo's Essence
card.typeLine: Legendary Creature — Moonfolk Monk // Legendary Enchantment

feature.name: Counter the first spell opponents cast each turn
Players can only cast one spell per turn

almostIncluded.description:
Whenever an opponent casts their first spell each turn, Erayo's Essence triggers, countering that spell.
Because Archon of Emeria prevents players from casting more than one spell each turn, opponents cannot cast any more spells this turn.

almostIncludedByAddingColors.description:
Activate Boromir by sacrificing it.
When Boromir dies, Ratadrabik triggers, creating a  nonlegendary token copy of Boromir that is a 2/2 Zombie in addition to its other types.
Resolve the Boromir ability from step 1, causing the Ring to tempt you, and for the Boromir token to become your Ring-bearer, thus making it legendary.
Repeat.

almostIncludedByAddingColors.notes: Moritte can only be your commander if the sources from both templates fit within its commander identity.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.description:
Cast Moritte either from your hand or from the command zone by paying {2}{G}{U}{U} plus commander tax if applicable. Choose to have it enter as a copy of the persist creature that is still legendary.
Put Moritte into your graveyard due to the legend rule. When it dies, its persist ability triggers, returning it from your graveyard to the battlefield with a +1/+1 counter on it due to its ability. Choose to have it enter as a copy of the persist creature that is still legendary.
Repeat step 2.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.notablePrerequisites: The persist creature is your Ring-bearer.
